description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 Docker image by default and caches the node_modules directory. Add a build-project job (default stage) that runs only on the master and develop branches, overrides the image to node:8, and executes: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release". The job should publish coverage/, doc/ and dist/ as artifacts that expire in 1 day and record coverage using the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Then add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs only on master, runs ls -l, creates a .public directory, moves coverage/ and doc/ into .public, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact that expires in 90 days.
